'''PowerPost''' was a small company that produced office supplies, including calculating machines and business [[Datapad/Legends|datapads]]. They entered the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] market with the [[SCM-22 stenographer]], licensing the [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] from [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. Initially, PowerPost only sold the SCM-22 through its authorized retail outlets, but the commercial success of the droid led the company to expanding and distributing the product through other channels. Despite this success, PowerPost had no plans to continue producing droids.<ref name="EGTD" />

{{Company-stub}}
